creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

After a bit more testing on FreeBSD/i386 and 
Solaris/amd64, I've committed the patch which 
updates gmalloc and bumped editors/emacs' 
port-revision. 

Can you try with the latest CVS version of editors/emacs 
and let me know if you can still reproduce the GTK+ related 
crashes reported?
